description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.6 Docker image with a global before_script that runs bundle install and defines the variables JEKYLL_ENV=production and LC_ALL=C.UTF-8. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that executes bundle exec jekyll build -d test, stores the test directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs bundle exec jekyll build -d public, publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch. Ensure the pipeline respects the before_script for both jobs and uses the appropriate artifacts and branch rules.
